title: Lab 0: Example Lab
description: Example of rendering html and embedding your presentation and report pdf.

title: Lab 3: Wall Following
description: LiDAR-powered wall following with RANSAC line detection and an emergency braking safety controller on an autonomous racecar.

title: Lab 4: Visual Servoing
description: Camera-based visual servoing for cone parking and line following using color segmentation, SIFT, template matching, YOLO, and homography.

title: Lab 5: Localization
description: Monte Carlo localization using particle filters for autonomous robot pose estimation.
